lastItems.title: Faster Gemma 4 on MLX with multi-token prediction
lastItems.summary: Gemma 4 is now significantly faster in Ollama 0.31 on Apple Silicon via multi-token prediction (MTP), powered by MLX. Performance is now up to 90% faster when used with coding agents, as measured using the Aider polyglot benchmark.

lastItems.title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: Loops, Software Factories & Forward Deployed Engineers
lastItems.summary: On Tuesday at the AI Engineer World's Fair, there was a lot of talk about loops, agent engineering, and the emergence of software factories. Also a hot topic: open models.

lastItems.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
